entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A pod borer pest that affects chickpea crops in Uttarakhand, India

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop targeted by the pod borer Helicoverpa armigera

entities.name: UTTARAKHAND
entities.description: A state in India where the research was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: CAMPOLETIS CHLORIDEAE
entities.description: A larval endo parasitoid used to control Helicoverpa armigera

entities.name: SEASONAL INCIDENCE
entities.description: A method used to study the timing and frequency of parasitization

entities.name: STATISTICAL TOOL
entities.description: Tools used to analyze the relationship between parasitization and weather parameters

entities.name: PERCENT PARASITIZATION
entities.description: The rate of parasitism of the pod borer by the parasitoid

entities.name: WEATHER PARAMETERS
entities.description: Abiotic factors that influence the rate of parasitization

entities.name: INTERCROPPING SYSTEM
entities.description: A cropping system involving the simultaneous growth of chickpea and coriander

entities.name: CORIANDER
entities.description: A crop used in an intercropping system with chickpea

entities.name: MAXIMUM TEMPERATURE
entities.description: An abiotic factor showing a non-significant positive correlation with parasitism in sole crops

entities.name: EVENING RELATIVE HUMIDITY
entities.description: An abiotic factor showing a significant positive correlation with parasitism in intercropping systems

entities.name: RAIN FALL
entities.description: An abiotic factor showing a significant positive correlation with parasitism in intercropping systems

entities.name: SUNSHINE HOURS
entities.description: An abiotic factor showing a non-significant positive correlation with parasitism in sole crops

entities.name: MINIMUM TEMPERATURE
entities.description: An abiotic factor showing a negative correlation with parasitism in sole crops

entities.name: MORNING RELATIVE HUMIDITY
entities.description: An abiotic factor showing a negative correlation with parasitism in sole crops

entities.name: PANTNAGAR
entities.description: The specific location in Uttarakhand where the study was conducted
